posts.author: yanyu (Yanyu)
posts.cookedHtml: i wanna know if monday can achieve automations to trigger a pandadoc contract creation using different templates based on different statuses. I used the pandadoc app and couldn’t find an automation or other ways to just automate the contract creation based on the templates and send it.
